optionsHelp.linear: Drag force F ∝ v; dominant at low Reynolds number.
optionsHelp.quadratic: Drag force F ∝ v²; typical for air resistance at moderate speed.
optionsHelp.polynomial: Mixed polynomial in v; fits empirical drag curves.
optionsHelp.custom: User-supplied expression for drag as a function of state.

optionsHelp.rules: Deterministic rule-based agent; no LLM, predictable decisions.
optionsHelp.deepseek: DeepSeek LLM interprets probes and suggests actions.
optionsHelp.hybrid: LLM proposes actions; rules validate and enforce safety constraints.
